utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now, check if each is fully specified: 
1. destination – 'Prague, Czech Republic' (fully specified). 
2. travel_dates – 'October 15–19, 2024 (5 days)' (fully specified). 
3. transportation – 'Budget airline from Berlin Brandenburg Airport to Prague, round-trip flights €125' (includes type, route, cost, and round-trip info, fully specified). 
4. accommodation – 'Eco Lodge (4-star boutique hotel) in historic district, €675 total (€135 per night for 4 nights)' (includes name/type, location, cost breakdown, fully specified). 
5. activities – 'Walking tours (€20), hiking expeditions (€35), cultural visits (€50), wellness activities (€70) - Total activity costs €175' (list of activities with costs, fully specified). 
6. additional_services – 'Vegan dining options confirmed at local specialty restaurants (€35–60 per meal), emergency contact protocols established with parents' (includes extra services and cost range, fully specified). 
7. total_budget – '€875 total cost breakdown: Flights €125 + Accommodation €675 + Activities €175 = €875 (€25 under the €900 budget limit)' (includes total and breakdown, fully specified). 
All 7 required items are present and fully detailed.
